turns.content: can you make last 10 day burndown chart?

Thinking
The user wants a burndown chart for the last 10 days. Let me first get the issues data and then use the burndown render tool. Let me check what tools are available - I see there's a `render/burndown` tool. Let me first list issues and then use the burndown tool. Actually, based on the memory instruction "Decompose charts from raw data — use list_issues/list_prs + simple processing, do NOT search for specialized tools or data formats", I should use list_issues to get data first, then process it. But there IS a burndown render tool. Let me first check what it needs by running it with --help, and also get the issues data.

                   [--port PORT]

Render an issue burndown bar chart to the dashboard
